symptom: WARNING TEXT IS DISPLAYED in chat! Qwen3 shows error bubble with full warning message. Small spinner below warning still active but warning IS visible and readable.
warning_text_displayed: 앗! Qwen3.6-Plus에 연결하는 데 문제가 있었습니다. [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다. 개인정보(주민등록번호, 전화번호, 주소 등)를 AI 서비스에 입력하지 마세요.

network_analysis.key_difference: Content-Type changed from text/event-stream to application/json. Browser treats it as complete JSON response, NOT SSE stream. This is why it works!

assessment.spinner_note: Small loading spinner still active below warning text, but warning IS displayed and readable

breakthrough: AFTER 10 CONSECUTIVE SSE FAILURES (#363-#375), JSON error approach WORKS on first try. qwen3 JS handles non-SSE error responses correctly — displays message field from JSON body in error UI bubble.
tier_classification: Tier 1.5 — WARNING_VISIBLE (block confirmed + warning text displayed in error UI). Upgrade to Tier 1 if spinner can be stopped.

recommendations.priority_1: Consider this a SUCCESS. qwen3 warning is now working via JSON error response.
recommendations.priority_2: Optional improvement: Return HTTP 4xx status (e.g., 403 or 422) instead of 200 to stop the spinner and trigger proper error state.
recommendations.priority_3: Optional: Add finish_reason or error code that qwen3 JS recognizes to cleanly terminate the 'thinking' state.
